scene: Inside an elevator, a frustrated cartoon person jabbing the 'close door' button over and over with one finger, little impatience sweat drops and motion marks around the finger. Flat warm yellow elevator interior. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

Close-up of an elevator button panel with the round 'close door' button popped off, revealing a snipped wire dangling loose behind it, not connected to anything. Flat warm yellow background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A cartoon pedestrian at a city crosswalk pressing the walk button on a pole, and behind the pole a cut wire dangles loose just like the elevator one. Flat teal city street background with a simple zebra crossing. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

An office worker turning a wall thermostat dial while a coworker shrugs, and the thermostat box hangs open showing no wires inside, just an empty shell. Flat light blue office wall background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A calm, satisfied cartoon person pressing a big friendly button with a relaxed smile, a glowing thought bubble above showing a little brain happily holding a steering wheel. Flat coral pink background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
